mapper.sql: id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, remark, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_post WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND post_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.postCode}, '%')
AND post_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.postName}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY post_sort ASC, created_time DESC
SELECT id, post_code, post_name, post_sort, status, remark, created_time, updated_time FROM sys_post WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_post SET post_code = #{postCode}, post_name = #{postName}, post_sort = #{postSort}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user_post WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND deleted = FALSE
